---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}






df <- read_csv(here("data", "bbc_bias_constituency_combined_revised.csv"))

df_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(const_name) %>%
  summarise(
    very_left = sum(mean[level == "very_left"], na.rm = TRUE),
    mod_left = sum(mean[level == "mod_left"], na.rm = TRUE),
    no_bias = sum(mean[level == "no_bias"], na.rm = TRUE),
    dont_know = sum(mean[level == "dont_know"], na.rm = TRUE),
    mod_right = sum(mean[level == "mod_right"], na.rm = TRUE),
    very_right = sum(mean[level == "very_right"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-const_name, ~ . * 100))

write.csv(df_summary, here("output", "bbc_bias_constituency_summary_revised.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

level_averages <- df %>%
  group_by(level) %>%
  summarise(avg_percentage = mean(mean) * 100)
